series_metadata.series_title: Legal Research Files, Research Memorandum and Attorney Work Papers
series_metadata.series_description: These files contain memoranda of law.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: electronic files no longer of administrative value
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
